title: Smoked Cod Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry made with smoked cod and a blend of spices. Serve with a side of rice or naan bread for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the smoked cod and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Stir in the yogurt and lemon juice.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, until the cod is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
